title: Carney, Pope Leo discuss responsible AI after pontiff warns world to slow development
description: Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke with Pope Leo about artificial intelligence and the "imperative that AI must serve humanity" — a conversation that comes days after the Pope urged governments to slow down the development of AI systems.
content:

title: Gov. Jared Polis signs law limiting chatbots' interactions with kids
description: Colorado Gov. Jared Polis signed a bill into law Friday that will restrict artificial intelligence-powered chatbots in their interactions with children over concerns about youth suicides and grooming.
content:
A new law signed Friday by Gov. Jared Polis will restrict artificial intelligence-powered chatbots, regulating the technology amid concern about its role in several suicides by young people.
The measure, which passed as House Bill 1263, focuses on sa... [1916 chars]

title: Researchers develop open source framework for health AI research
description: A research team led by Columbia University has developed an open-source framework designed to streamline and accelerate artificial intelligence research using health data, addressing longstanding challenges in data standardization, reproducibility, and collaboration across institutions.
